name: Quest Parker
tagline: Data Scientist · Solutions Engineer · AI Consultant · Deployment Strategist · Forward Deployed Engineer
bio_short: I build data-driven solutions that generate measurable business impact — from ML clustering models that surface millions in hidden costs to LLM-powered document analysis and predictive analytics pipelines.
bio_long: Quest Parker sits at the intersection of data science, machine learning, and enterprise consulting. With a background spanning ML engineering, AI development, and forward-deployed client engagements, I specialize in taking data solutions from proof-of-concept to production. Currently at Celonis as a Value Engineer and Applied AI Champion, I lead foundational analytics initiatives and data science hackathons at national scale. My work spans ML modeling, NLP clustering, LLM applications, process mining, and data pipelines — always anchored to real business outcomes. Pursuing an MS in Computer Science (AI focus) at CU Boulder while applying that knowledge daily in the field.

roles.label: Data Scientist
roles.description: Building ML models, statistical analyses, and data pipelines across healthcare, supply chain, legal, and automotive sectors

roles.label: Solutions Engineer
roles.description: Architecting and delivering end-to-end technical solutions tailored to client needs — from scoping and design to production deployment

roles.label: AI Consultant
roles.description: Translating AI and ML capabilities into enterprise solutions — scoping use cases, building PoCs, and driving adoption with clients

roles.label: Deployment Strategist
roles.description: Owning end-to-end proof-of-value cycles — from discovery workshops to production launches that stick

roles.label: Forward Deployed Engineer
roles.description: Embedding with clients to build custom technical solutions against live enterprise data, on-site and at pace
